# SKLabelVerticalAlignmentMode.center

**Case**

Centers the text vertically on the node’s origin.

## Declaration

```swift
case center
```

## Constants

- **SKLabelVerticalAlignmentMode.baseline**: Positions the text so that the font’s baseline lies on the node’s origin.
- **SKLabelVerticalAlignmentMode.top**: Positions the text so that the top of the text is on the node’s origin.
- **SKLabelVerticalAlignmentMode.bottom**: Positions the text so that the bottom of the text is on the node’s origin.
